experiment_11.Task: Reproduce a published Candidozyma auris RNA-seq analysis in Galaxy and validate the reproduction against paper-reported results.
experiment_11.Prompt: Reproduce the Anton et al. 2025 Candidozyma auris RNA-seq reanalysis in Galaxy using the studies and sample groups listed in the attached manifests. Use the paper’s RNA-seq counting and DE analysis stack, reconcile legacy gene identifiers correctly, and report the Santana tnSWI1-vs-AR0382 correlation, the Wang in-vivo DEG count, the Wang in-vitro SCF1 log2 fold change, and the mapping method.
